title: 不道德行为的根源 / Root cause of unethical behavior
point: 金融机构过度强调销售目标与利润、加上佣金导向的薪酬结构,会造成给客户不当建议或销售不适合产品的偏向。 / Excessive focus on sales targets and profit plus commission-based pay creates bias toward inappropriate advice or unsuitable products.
keyfacts: 代表为保住工作而采取不道德手段 / Reps resort to unethical practices to stay employed
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.17 — Unethical Behavior 1.1–1.2

title: 洗单 Churning / Churning
point: Churning 指寿险代理人说服客户在短期内终止现有保单,转购对客户无实质益处的相似产品。 / Churning is persuading clients to terminate existing policies after a short period and switch to similar products with no real benefit.
keyfacts: 只盯销售与利润的公司可能纵容、默许甚至鼓励洗单 / Sales-only firms may condone or encourage churning
迟早曝光并招致不利后果 / Eventually exposed with adverse consequences
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.17 — Unethical Behavior 1.5–1.6

title: 高佣金 vs 适合性 / High commission vs suitability
point: 代表可能推高佣金的终身寿险(whole life),而定期寿险(term)其实更适合或更便宜。 / A rep may push a high-commission whole life policy when a term policy would be more suitable or cheaper.
keyfacts: 为佣金而非客户利益服务 / Serving commission, not the client
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.17 — Unethical Behavior 1.4

title: 错配保单案例 / Mismatched policy case
point: 2015-10-05《海峡时报》:离婚客户被售年保费 S$40K 保单(高于年收入),第二年退保几无退保价值,与其流动性需求错配。 / Straits Times, 5 Oct 2015: a divorcee was sold a S$40K-premium policy above her income; second-year surrender yielded little value — mismatched to her liquidity needs.
keyfacts: 离婚后存款约 S$350K,本只想要更好储蓄利率 / ~S$350K deposit; she only wanted a better savings rate
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.17 — Unethical Behavior 1.7

title: 不道德行为类型(节选) / Types of unethical behavior (selected)
point: 包括操纵与定价合谋、定价缺陷、洗单与转保、虚假/误导陈述、未识别客户需求、回扣佣金、拒赔/拖延理赔、滥用客户个人资料等。 / Includes rigging and price fixing, pricing flaws, churning/switching, false or misleading representations, failure to identify needs, commission rebating, denying/delaying claims, and misuse of client data.
keyfacts: 教材列出约二十多项类型 / The text lists over twenty types
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.17 — Unethical Behavior 2.1

title: 回扣佣金 / Rebating commission
point: 把部分佣金回扣给潜在客户作为投保诱因属不道德行为之一。 / Rebating part of the commission as an incentive to a prospective client is one type of unethical behavior.
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.17 — Unethical Behavior 2.1(o)

title: 道德决策的定义 / Ethical decision making defined
point: 道德决策是依据道德原则在各方案中评估并选择的过程:察觉并剔除不道德选项,选出最佳道德方案。 / Ethical decision making is evaluating and choosing among alternatives consistent with ethical principles — eliminating unethical options and selecting the best ethical one.
keyfacts: 不同世界观使人对同一情境有不同解读 / Different worldviews lead to different interpretations
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.17 — Unethical Behavior 3.1–3.2

title: 道德决策的四个障碍 / Four obstacles to ethical decision making
point: (a) 品格败坏、(b) 缺乏道德感知、(c) 屈服于诱惑、(d) 合理化。 / (a) Corrupted character, (b) lack of moral perception, (c) giving in to temptation, (d) rationalization.
keyfacts: 障碍=妨碍/拖慢/阻止作出最佳道德选择的因素 / An obstacle slows or stops the best ethical choice
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.17 — Unethical Behavior 3.3–3.4
